name: Product Positioning
description: Define clear market positioning: category, differentiation, messaging framework, competitive wedge, and positioning statement.

outputs.name: category
outputs.description: Market category definition and why this category

outputs.name: target_customer
outputs.description: Ideal customer profile with qualifying criteria

outputs.name: competitive_alternatives
outputs.description: What customers use today instead, with weaknesses

outputs.name: value_themes
outputs.description: 2-3 value themes that map attributes to customer needs

outputs.name: positioning_statement
outputs.description: For [target], [product] is the [category] that [key benefit] unlike [alternatives] because [unique attribute]

quality_checks.name: positioning_specific
quality_checks.description: Positioning is specific to this product, not generic

quality_checks.name: alternatives_real
quality_checks.description: Competitive alternatives are real, not straw men
